title: Keep In Touch
excerpt: We want to keep in touch so you can stay updated on CBM news and events! Please make sure your contact information is up to date. To create your alumni profile, you can click here. If you are already on our alumni list but would like to update your information, please click here to login. Once logged […]
contentHtml:
We want to keep in touch so you can stay updated on CBM news and events! Please make sure your contact information is up to date.

To create your alumni profile, you can click here.

If you are already on our alumni list but would like to update your information, please click here to login. Once logged in, click on “Forms & Documents” and then select “Alumni Profile Update Form.” You’ll be able to see what we already have on file and correct anything that has changed.

Join the CBM Alumni Facebook Group
Follow @Camp.Barney.Medintz on Instagram
Connect with Camp Barney Medintz on LinkedIn
Like CBM on Facebook
